codeReview.summary: The delivered commit only retuned reviewApi and FileUpload tests. It does not touch the required persistence or returned-review baseline tests and therefore does not satisfy the feature scope, even though the adjusted tests pass.

issues.description: The feature explicitly required directly fixing or updating `useReviewStore.persistence.test.ts`, `useUserStore.persistence.test.ts`, `ResubmissionTaskList.test.ts`, and `WorkflowReturnDialog.test.ts` (or their real dependencies), but the commit only changes reviewApi/FileUpload tests. This leaves the requested persistence/review baseline work unimplemented.

Stabilizing `FileUpload.test.ts` is outside the assigned baseline files and does not provide evidence that the `localhost:3000` access causing the specified persistence/review test instability was actually removed from those targeted flows. The handoff still reports full-suite localhost:3000 warnings as pre-existing, contradicting the feature's required behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker skill mandates agent-browser verification, but this baseline-fix feature only required automated test stabilization; the worker skipped browser verification and recorded that the procedure did not fit the task.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/designer-tracking-worker/SKILL.md step 6 requires agent-browser; handoff.skillFeedback in /Users/dongpengcheng/.factory/missions/ed11d871-9b91-4833-a106-380682e638ec/handoffs/2026-03-16T21-31-38-897Z__fix-returned-contract-baseline-persistence-and-review-timeouts__bd13771d-e2d4-485f-9bb6-2c7d59e9ebb9.json says the worker skipped it because no runtime UI change was involved.

summary: Review failed: commit 1b9551f improved unrelated reviewApi/FileUpload test assertions, but it did not implement the requested fixes for the specified persistence and returned-review baseline tests, nor did it eliminate the localhost:3000 accesses from the targeted failing area.
